The Morning After

an indie game studio

what we're working on

WHISPER HOLLOW

Survey log of acoustic absence within an abandoned settlement.

etc

We construct interactive systems that behave like documents: fragmented, unreliable, and subject to interpretation.

Influences include maritime logs, forensic reports, and pre-digital classification systems.
